title: Bloomberg Terminal Worksheet
description: Represents a Bloomberg Terminal worksheet, which is a named collection of securities. Worksheets are used in the Bloomberg Terminal for organizing watchlists, portfolios, and security groups. They can be created, read, and modified through the Terminal Connect API.

securities.description: List of Bloomberg security identifiers contained in the worksheet.

created.description: Timestamp when the worksheet was created.

modified.description: Timestamp when the worksheet was last modified.
